name: Wells Ave Y, West Suburban YMCA
description:
The West Suburban YMCA has been an integral part of the Pickleball community in Newton for years, with three courts available at the Church St location and now an additional 6 courts available at the new Wells Ave location. We love how passionate, dedicated, and welcoming the Y's pickleball players (picklers) are and can see through their active involvement why we are called "The Pickleball Hub".

Picklers at the West Suburban YMCA play on indoor courts with multiple court and location options, truly making it a year-round "hub". Drop in pickleball play is offered 7 days a week, along with seasonal leagues and clinics. Check our pickleball page for hours at www.wsymca.org/programs-classes/sports/pickle-ball.

Free for WSYMCA Members
Non-Members must pay the guest pass fee ($15 or $20)
